meta.pageTitle: Sergio Parissi Reyes — Senior .NET & Sitecore Specialist
meta.description: 10+ years in .NET & C#, 7+ in Sitecore. Azure cloud, AI-assisted development. Senior Software Developer at EPAM Systems.

profile.name: Sergio Parissi Reyes
profile.title: Senior .NET Developer · Sitecore Specialist · Cloud & Azure

summary.label: About
paragraphs: .NET developer at heart. With 10+ years of experience in C#, ASP.NET MVC, and .NET Core, I architect and deliver robust, scalable enterprise applications — from clean API design and data layers to cloud infrastructure on Azure. My foundation is deep backend engineering: performant, maintainable, production-grade code.

Over the past 7+ years, I have built a strong specialization on top of that .NET core: the Sitecore ecosystem — Helix/Habitat architecture, SXA, JSS (Headless CMS), Sitecore Commerce, and Personalization — delivering CMS solutions for global enterprise clients. Sitecore runs on .NET, and understanding the platform at its deepest level is what sets me apart.

Currently at EPAM Systems, I serve as the primary technical point of contact for enterprise clients — leading architectural decisions, Azure cloud deployments, and root-cause analysis on critical systems. I also build PowerShell automation for Sitecore operations — log analysis, layout management, and environment maintenance — reducing manual overhead and keeping environments healthy. Beyond code, I act as a trusted technical advisor and actively mentor developers: conducting code reviews, guiding onboarding, and promoting a culture of continuous learning across the team. Over the past year I have integrated AI-assisted development (Claude / Claude Code) into my daily workflow — accelerating code generation, refactoring, and documentation while personally reviewing and validating every change before it lands in production.

jobs.title: Senior .NET Developer
bullets: Primary technical point of contact for multiple enterprise clients, leading root-cause analysis, technical roadmap discussions, and feature design for mission-critical Sitecore applications.
Architected and developed custom Sitecore solutions using Helix, SXA, JSS, and Sitecore Personalization, ensuring performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability.
Proactively proposed and evaluated multiple technical solutions per client request, clearly outlining trade-offs, risks, and implementation strategies — accelerating decision-making cycles.
Deployed, configured, and managed Azure resources (App Services, Azure Functions, Storage, SQL), maintaining high availability and security across all environments.
Monitored application health, validated infrastructure stability, and coordinated rapid incident response — reducing client-reported downtime.
Produced comprehensive technical documentation for knowledge transfer, onboarding, and client audits.

Built and maintained PowerShell automation scripts for Sitecore environments — automating log analysis, layout management, reference cleanup, and IP-range configurations — significantly reducing manual operational overhead.

Mentored engineers across the team: conducted code reviews, facilitated knowledge-sharing sessions, and actively supported onboarding of new developers — fostering a culture of continuous learning and technical growth.

Used Azure Application Insights and the Sitecore Pipeline Profiler to diagnose performance bottlenecks, monitor application health in real time, and drive targeted optimizations across Sitecore environments.

Adopted AI-assisted development (Claude / Claude Code) over the past year to accelerate engineering workflows — code generation, refactoring, documentation, and analysis — maintaining full review and validation of every change before integration.

jobs.title: Senior Sitecore Developer (Independent)
jobs.location: Remote · Part-time / Parallel to Vanco role
bullets: Designed and delivered end-to-end Sitecore CMS solutions for clients across multiple industries, following Helix architecture and Sitecore best practices.
Built and integrated headless CMS components via custom REST APIs and the Sitecore JSS framework, enabling decoupled front-end architectures.
Provided strategic technical consulting for Sitecore upgrades, SXA implementations, and personalization initiatives.
Managed full project lifecycle independently: requirements, scoping, development, QA, delivery, and documentation.

jobs.title: Senior Software Development Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained enterprise web apps using C#, ASP.NET MVC, .NET Core, Web API, Angular, and React.
Integrated Azure Functions and event-driven cloud services to support scalable, asynchronous workflows in a multi-tenant architecture.
Authored and maintained NUnit unit and integration tests, raising code quality and reducing regression risk.
Defined and rolled out a Git branching strategy adopted company-wide, improving collaboration and release velocity.
Contributed actively to Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines, enabling automated builds, tests, and deployments.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET)
bullets: Designed and implemented a centralized automated testing framework used across multiple products, standardizing regression coverage company-wide.
Implemented application monitoring and observability using ELK Stack and MongoDB, enabling proactive production issue detection.
Defined, documented, and rolled out a new QA process improving consistency and software quality across teams.
Developed and maintained Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines for automated test execution and deployment workflows.

jobs.title: QA Automation Engineer / Senior QA
bullets: Planned, designed, and executed test strategies for web and mobile applications (iOS), driving early adoption of mobile automation.
Developed automated test scripts with Selenium, expanding regression coverage and reducing manual testing effort.
Defined QA policies, testing standards, and technical procedures to ensure data integrity and system reliability.

jobs.title: Junior Software Developer (PHP)
bullets: Developed data management web applications using PHP and SQL Server, supporting internal business processes.
Designed and executed SQL scripts to process and manipulate large data volumes efficiently.
